title: selaginella shabaensis
intro: Selaginella shabaensis, also known as the Congo spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss, a type of small, non-vascular plant that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella shabaensis include its ability to reduce fever and relieve pain, as well as its potential to protect against certain infections and diseases. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
